---
title: "Chapter 1: Introduction"
---

## Overview

This chapter introduces the fundamental concepts of numerical methods for energy, thermal, and fluid engineering applications.

## Learning Objectives

- Understand the role of numerical methods in engineering
- Review mathematical preliminaries
- Introduction to computational tools and techniques

## Topics

### 1.1 Motivation

### 1.2 Numerical vs. Analytical Solutions

### 1.3 Error Analysis

### 1.4 Computational Considerations
